name_cn:
MIUMIU Calfskin Backpack, Large
Black 🖤
The leather texture of this black backpack is amazing ❗️
Large capacity to fit a sports water bottle, phone, compact powder, and headphones, with an adjustable strap 💫
Switch easily between shoulder and backpack styles, perfect for sports or shopping!
🔍Size: 29.5*25*12.5cm
📌Model: 5BZ042M1680
